author: maxine--futura
content: Migration approach: copy old chainlink db (877 issues, 682 comments, 58 deps, 9 sessions) over the fresh crosslink db, then ALTER TABLE to add crosslink's new columns (uuid, created_by, kind, author, agent_id, token_usage table). Old issue #1 is 'Write tests for atdata.local' (archived). The migration tracking issue will be re-created as #878.
